name: Spicy Vegetable Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix well until thoroughly combined.
3. Chill the mixture for at least an hour before serving.
4. Serve as a dip with celery sticks, green onions, green pepper slices, cauliflower florets, or other crisp raw vegetables.
5. Makes approximately 1 and 1/3 cups.
6. Serving size: 2 tablespoons (18 calories, free food; 1.2 grams protein; 0.3 grams fat; 2.8 grams carbohydrate; 260.2 milligrams sodium; 72.2 milligrams potassium; 0.2 grams fiber; 1 milligram cholesterol).
